text: The cardinality of a set containing elements that are sets is _____.
answer: The number of elements and sets as single elements
a: The sum of elements inside each set
b: The number of elements and sets as single elements
c: The total number of elements inside all sets combined

d: Only subsets with cardinality greater than 1
